name: Build and Test CyberSecurity ChatBot

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: windows-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Setup .NET 6.0
      uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v3
      with:
        dotnet-version: '6.0.x'

    - name: Restore dependencies
      run: dotnet restore PROG6221w-POE_CyberSecurityChatBot/PROG6221w-POE_CyberSecurityChatBot.csproj

    - name: Build the project
      run: dotnet build PROG6221w-POE_CyberSecurityChatBot/PROG6221w-POE_CyberSecurityChatBot.csproj --no-restore --configuration Release
